questionHtml: Using evidence from the chart, identify, giving a reason, which group of neurons responded most to the chemicals.
markschemeHtml:
G1 always respond more than 25% «except control», while G2 and G3 always respond 25% or less ✔

G1 always responds more than G2 and G3/all of the others ✔

OWTTE

meta.title: Using evidence from the chart, identify, giving a reason, which group of neurons responded most to the chemicals.
